forgotten-depths-ii.description: A retro dungeon crawler built with Electron, TypeScript, and HTML5 Canvas. Features EGA-palette graphics at 640×400, first-person dungeon exploration with wall-segment rendering, turn-based combat on an isometric grid, a full town hub with shops and guild, and a data-driven content system. Built entirely by an automated AI pipeline.

gallery.caption: Main Menu — Title screen with New Game, Load Game, Settings, and About options
About Screen — Credits, version info, D&D 5e SRD licensing, and tech stack
Ironhaven — Town hub with Town Hall, Guild, Temple, Shop, and Tavern
Shop — Two-panel merchant interface with buy/sell/equip controls
Temple — Healing services including Cure Wounds, Cure Poison, Cure Disease, and Raise Dead
The Broken Axe Tavern — Listen for rumors, rest at the inn, or buy drinks
Town Hall — Mayor Aldric offers quests to the party
Character Sheet — Full stat block with abilities, equipment, and spell slots
Overworld Map — Plains biome with towns, dungeons, and the party marker
Dungeon Entry — Confirmation prompt before entering the Goblin Warrens
Dungeon Exploration — First-person view in the Ruins of Ashenmire with minimap and party HUD
Quest Log — Active, Available, and Completed quest tracking
